BARAKAT CONSULTING, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF IS DENIED. BECAUSE THE QUESTION OF WHAT THE PARTIES INTENDED WHEN THEY AGREED THAT CHEVRON ENERGY SOLUTIONS' ELECTION TO EXIT THE PUBLIC POWER DEVELOPMENT BUSINESS REMAINS AN ISSUE OF TRIABLE FACT, BCI'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS HEREBY DENIED. CCP SEC. 437C(G).
